narrative.narrative: Fear has a stranglehold on the market as the Fear & Greed Index sinks to 31, yet beneath the surface, stablecoin reserves are quietly expanding—a classic divergence that echoes the August 2024 bottom. With BTC momentum stalling over the past 30 days and price trapped in a sideways regime, sidelined capital is accumulating dry powder rather than fleeing, suggesting this anxiety phase is more about digestion than distribution.
narrative.headline: Fear Grips While Smart Money Accumulates

next_move.outlook: The narrative arc points toward a compression breakout as sidelined stablecoin capital eventually seeks re-entry, mirroring the August 2024 recovery pattern.

consensus.key_reasoning: Both brains align on a sideways Anxiety phase where fear-greed at 31 and stablecoin growth signal accumulation rather than distribution, but diverging ETF flows, VIX, and MVRV factors create enough crosscurrent risk to justify patience over conviction. The 78.8% pattern match to the August 2024 accumulation bottom is compelling but not yet confirmed by on-chain momentum, so HOLD captures the asymmetric setup without premature exposure.
